rulings.Case Title: ANDREW WARRI et al VS. CAREY LIMOUSINE OF S.F., INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: CLI FLEET's demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the 13th cause of action for Unlawful Business Practices and Fraud (to the extent it applies to CLI Fleet) and the 14th cause of action for FRAUD. CLS FLEET's demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to the 15th cause of action for Contract Adhesion and Unconscionability. (JH)

rulings.Case Title: ANDREW WARRI et al VS. CAREY LIMOUSINE OF S.F., INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: CAREY DEFENDANTS' demurrer is: OVERRULED as to the 1st cause of action for Unlawful Retention of Gratuities; the 2nd cause of action for Untimely Payment of Compensation; the 3rd cause of action forUnlawful Failure to Pay Workers Compensation; the 4th cause of action for Unlawful Failure to Provide and Maintain Equipment and Tools overruled; the 6th cause of action for Failure to Pay Overtime; the 11th cause of action for Breach of Contract; and the 13th cause of action for Unfair Competition. SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND to allege fraud with specificity as to: the 7th cause of action for Fraud: Misclassification of Employees; the 9th cause of action for Fraud: Inducement to Enter Contract; the 10th cause of action for Fraud: Execution of I.O. Agreement; the 12th cause of action for Fraud and Deceit; and the 14th cause of action for Fraud: The CLI Fleet Vehicle Lease Agreement (to the extent it applies to the Carey Defendants). SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND for failure to state a cause of action as to: the 5th cause of action for Failure to Pay California Payroll Taxes; the 8th cause of action for Misclassification of Employees; and the 15th cause of action for Adhesion and Unconscionability (to the extent it applies to the Carey Defendants). (JH)
